Sponsorships / Viper Gaming

Viper Gaming

hardware
Affiliate
Commission Varies
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Viper Gaming is a brand of Patriot Memory, a global leader in performance memory, Solid State Drives (SSD’s), and flash storage solutions. Viper Gaming was established in 2007 with the unveiling of the well-known, top-tier line of computer memory. Since then, the Viper Gaming brand has become synonymous with elite performance and reliability among gamers worldwide.

Affiliate Program

Are you a streamer or rising team that could use a boost? Sign up to Viper Gaming’s affiliate program to earn commissions and get free gear.

Viper Gaming has a three tier program where you’re able to earn more as you level up.

Tier 1: Novice

  • Discount code
  • Free t-shirt with purchase
  • 15% off peripherals

Tier 2: Intermediate

  • Viper gaming headset sponsorship
  • Discount code
  • Free swag bag with purchase
  • 15% off peripherals

Tier 3: Advanced

  • Full peripheral sponsorship
  • Free gear
  • 15% off PC components
  • Social support
  • Affiliate links Go to their site to learn more about the program and how to advance through each tier.
